channel.title: 战况追踪 — Global Conflict Monitor
channel.description: 实时追踪全球主要冲突态势，多源聚合情报

item.title: [俄乌战争] MEDIA → UKRAINE : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Lugansk, Luhans'ka Oblast', Ukraine)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: MEDIA / UKRAINE. Location: Lugansk, Luhans'ka Oblast', Ukraine. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 8 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] ISRAEL → nan : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Saudi Arabia)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: ISRAEL / nan. Location: Saudi Arabia. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 1 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] ISRAEL → BASQUE : Expel or deport individuals (Gaza, Israel (general), Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Expel or deport individuals. Actors: ISRAEL / BASQUE. Location: Gaza, Israel (general), Israel. Goldstein Scale: -5.0. Mentioned in 10 sources.

item.title: [美伊对峙] A US → IRAN : Employ aerial weapons (Iran)
item.description: GDELT Event: Employ aerial weapons. Actors: A US / IRAN. Location: Iran. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 6 sources.

item.title: [美伊对峙] MILITARY → IRAN : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Tehran, Tehran, Iran)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: MILITARY / IRAN. Location: Tehran, Tehran, Iran. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 2 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Use unconventional violence, not specified below. Actors: IRAN / nan. Location: Tehran, Tehran, Iran. Goldstein Scale: -9.0. Mentioned in 2 sources.

item.title: [俄乌战争] nan → UNITED STATES : Occupy territory (Russia)
item.description: GDELT Event: Occupy territory. Actors: nan / UNITED STATES. Location: Russia. Goldstein Scale: -9.5. Mentioned in 1 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action. Actors: VIKTOR ORBAN / HUNGARY. Location: Ukraine. Goldstein Scale: -5.0. Mentioned in 2 sources.
